docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $965.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY CHEN, YUN AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YUN AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SURESM RANGARAJAN, HOA BOARD SECRETARY FILED BY DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF YUN CHEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE BEACON RESIDENTIALCOMMUNITY ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
